metadata.description: Trust-attestation skills for Claude agents on the open web. Built claude-first on the TunnelMind verify/preflight API.

plugins.name: tunnelmind-trust
plugins.description: Consult TunnelMind before acting on, and to attest the identity of, any external destination — allow/caution/deny pre-flight + fused Scry x Sigil x GhostRoute verdict, each with a signed receipt.
